ksa_text: Skill in translating business questions and customer requirements into structured analytical approaches, including defining data requirements, scoping analysis, and selecting appropriate methodology.

Ability to design valid and reliable assessments.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Applied Analytics & BI is a primary or secondary domain for the AI Innovation Lead. This skill KSA is within scope for the role's expected competency profile and seniority level (senior specialist).

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (Applied Analytics & BI), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Pass 1 signal is moderate (composite 0.46). External reviewers may question whether this specific skill KSA is sufficiently distinctive for the AI Innovation Lead versus adjacent roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Gartner analytics maturity model and BI leadership surveys confirm applied analytics and BI competencies for analytics leadership.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: moderate framework signal is consistent with Applied Analytics & BI appearing in job postings and role definition literature for AI Innovation Lead.

decision_rationale: Applied Analytics & BI skill KSA is within scope for the AI Innovation Lead at the senior specialist tier. Seniority fit is appropriate. All three evaluation passes support inclusion.
